key_items: CME Group Goes Live With 24/7 Crypto Futures and Options, Launches Bitcoin Volatility Contracts
Japan's ruling party pushes crypto ETFs, yen-denominated stablecoins
Strategy's BTC sale turns Bitcoin treasury into market stress test
reasoning: Regulatory tailwinds from Japan and CME infrastructure expansion support medium-term adoption, but near-term sentiment is mixed by institutional profit-taking (Strategy sale, $30M BlackRock ETF exit) and technical weakness suggesting Bitcoin remains range-bound between $60-70K. Macro uncertainty from 4-year cycle concerns and ETH whale liquidations create headwinds offsetting positive regulatory developments.
risks: A breakdown below $60K support could trigger cascade liquidations and validate the bearish 4-year cycle theory cited by multiple analysts, accelerating downside momentum.
